SELECT value, cbrt(value) AS cube_root FROM nums;
SELECT DISTINCT cbrt(value) FROM nums WHERE value < 100;
SELECT cbrt((SELECT AVG(value) FROM nums WHERE value > 0)) AS average_cube_root;
CREATE TABLE nums2 (id INT, num FLOAT);
SELECT n.id, n.num, cbrt(n.num) FROM nums2 n JOIN nums m ON cbrt(m.value) > cbrt(n.num);
SELECT cbrt(COALESCE(NULLIF((SELECT SUM(value) FROM nums), 0), 1)) AS safe_cbrt;
SELECT cbrt(t1.value) + cbrt(t2.num) AS combined_cube_root FROM nums t1 CROSS JOIN nums2 t2;
